Description: Text identifier for a certificate or test number, which is assigned on the basis of a safety check.
Identifier of the Underwriters Laboratories Inc. You can enter e.g. UL certifications, UL file numbers, or other test numbers here.

Certification for explosion protection in accordance with the ATEX Directive of the European Union. The designation ATEX is derived from the French abbreviation for "ATmosphère EXplosibles".
